hero.title: The Marketplace for AI Agent Skills
hero.subtitle: Discover, install, and trade verified AI Agent Skills on BNB Chain. Security-first marketplace with built-in economic incentives for open-source developers.

pillars.heading: Why SafuSkill
pillars.subheading: One platform for discovering, securing, and monetizing AI Agent Skills

marketplace.title: Skill Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Browse, discover, and install AI Agent Skills. Filter by category, security score, and popularity. Every skill is verified by GoPlus AgentGuard.

security.title: Security First
security.desc: Every skill is automatically scanned for malicious code, data leaks, and vulnerabilities before it reaches users.

economy.title: Skill Economy
economy.desc: Skill Tokens create an economic layer around AI skills — rewarding developers, engaging communities, and driving adoption.

discover.title: Discover Skills
discover.desc: Find AI Agent Skills for your use case. Install verified, community-vetted skills in one click.

build.title: Build & Publish
build.desc: Developers create skills and publish to the marketplace. GoPlus AgentGuard verifies code safety.

launch.title: Launch Token
launch.desc: Create a Skill Token to build community around a skill. Trade on bonding curve, graduate to PancakeSwap.

grow.title: Grow Together
grow.desc: Developers earn from trading fees. Users discover better skills. Community drives the ecosystem forward.

tokenomics.heading: Skill Token Economics
tokenomics.subheading: Every Skill Token follows the same transparent, fair-launch model

tax.heading: Tax Distribution
tax.note: Developer revenue is held in a secure treasury. Authors can claim earnings after verifying their GitHub identity and connecting a wallet.

cta.heading: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheading: Find the perfect AI skills for your agents, publish your own, or explore the Skill Economy on BNB Chain.
